items.title: Password Managers: 3 Key Differences for a Secure Choice
items.description: Last month, on a client project, I realized that a password shared by a developer for accessing the development environment came from a leaked service in another infrastructure. This situation once again demonstrated how critical password managers are, not just for personal but also for corporate

items.title: Why iPhone Videos Fail as Telegram Avatars and How I Fixed It
items.description:
Last month a friend tried to set a video from her iPhone as her Telegram profile video. Telegram accepted the upload, spun for a second, then quietly did nothing. No error message. The video just never appeared.

The cause is boring: iPhones have recorded HEVC (H.265) by default since iOS 1

items.title: translateZ()
items.description: The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

items.title: translateY()
